project.name: Knowledge Hub
project.description: Internal memory and handoff service for AI-assisted work sessions.
project.current_goal: Move from internal alpha toward calmer production deploy readiness with strong automation.
project.rules: Prefer automation over manual entry. Keep the system simple, reliable, and ready for future multi-user growth.

latest_snapshot.title: Current internal state
latest_snapshot.content: Knowledge Hub now has project packages, automation events, inbox watcher status, backup archives, and copy-friendly handoff pages.

recent_snapshots.title: Current internal state
recent_snapshots.content: Knowledge Hub now has project packages, automation events, inbox watcher status, backup archives, and copy-friendly handoff pages.

recent_logs.task: Add a production env status page for Render-facing configuration
recent_logs.summary: Knowledge Hub now shows a dedicated deploy env status page, API, and CLI so missing, default, or blocking production env variables are obvious before the first live deploy.
actions_taken: Added deploy env status service with phase-one and phase-two grouping
Added deploy env page, API endpoint, and CLI wrappers
Linked env status into the home, readiness, and setup flow
blockers: Real Render values are still missing for public base URL, SMTP host, owner email, and secret key
Production SMTP is still not verified end-to-end against the live service
recent_logs.next_step: Use the new env status page to drive one real Render env setup pass and then verify SMTP delivery against the live deployment.

recent_logs.task: Add public-base-url handling and a Render deploy setup guide
recent_logs.summary: Knowledge Hub now supports KH_PUBLIC_BASE_URL for stable magic-link URLs and ships a copy-friendly deploy setup guide with phased Render env values for SMTP first and auth-required second.
actions_taken: Added KH_PUBLIC_BASE_URL support to external magic-link URLs
Added deploy setup page, API, and CLI with phased Render env blocks
Extended readiness to fail production when public base URL is missing or local
blockers: Real Render env values still need to be set for public base URL, SMTP, owner email, and secret key
There is still no verified production SMTP provider configured against the live service
recent_logs.next_step: Add one production env status page that makes the remaining real Render values impossible to miss before the first live deploy.

recent_logs.task: Add auth-required private mode on top of magic-link login
recent_logs.summary: Knowledge Hub can now require sign-in for private pages and APIs, preserve next targets after magic-link login, and warn if production auth is enabled without real mail delivery.
actions_taken: Added KH_AUTH_REQUIRED enforcement for private HTML and API routes
Added login redirects with next return path preservation
Extended deploy readiness to catch auth-plus-file-mail lockout risk
blockers: Render production still needs real SMTP before KH_AUTH_REQUIRED can be enabled safely
Owner email and secret key are still placeholder values in the current local baseline
recent_logs.next_step: Prepare the first provider-ready Render email setup path and tighten the deploy checklist around real production env values.

recent_logs.task: Add the first real SMTP delivery path for magic-link login
recent_logs.summary: Knowledge Hub now supports SMTP delivery, SMTP readiness checks, and a safe test-email CLI without removing the file outbox fallback.
actions_taken: Added SMTP backend support to the mail service layer
Added SMTP config checks to deploy readiness
Added send_test_email CLI for calm delivery verification
blockers: A real SMTP provider is still not configured in production env vars
Render still uses placeholder mail sender and owner settings
recent_logs.next_step: Configure a real SMTP provider on Render and verify one real magic-link delivery end-to-end.

recent_logs.task: Add file-outbox email delivery for magic-link login
recent_logs.summary: Added a mail service with file outbox delivery, mail status API, and login flow that now delivers links through the configured backend instead of showing the raw link directly.
actions_taken: Added file outbox mail backend
Connected magic-link login to mail delivery
Surfaced mail status in API, home UI, and deploy readiness
blockers: Mail sender address still uses a local placeholder domain
There is still no real external email provider yet
Production config still uses placeholder owner email and local dev secret
recent_logs.next_step: Move from file outbox delivery to the first calmer external email integration path.

recent_logs.task: Add the first real magic-link login slice
recent_logs.summary: Added one-time login tokens, session-based actor resolution, sign-in/sign-out routes, and a UI login page.
actions_taken: Added login token model and auth service
Added magic-link login page and session sign-in
Integrated session actor into request access resolution
blockers: Magic link is shown in the UI directly and is not sent by email yet
Production config still uses placeholder owner email and local dev secret
recent_logs.next_step: Move from local magic-link login to the first calmer email-delivery or external auth integration path.

recent_logs.task: Add the first auth-ready workspace access slice
recent_logs.summary: Added current actor resolution, dev actor override, membership-scoped workspace/project access, and owner/admin member management.
actions_taken: Resolved a current actor for every request
Scoped workspace and project views by membership
Added member management from workspace detail and API
blockers: Still no real authentication or login flow
Production config still uses placeholder owner email and local dev secret
recent_logs.next_step: Move from auth-ready access control into the first real login/authentication slice.

recent_logs.task: Add deploy-readiness checklist for calmer production rollout
recent_logs.summary: Added deploy-readiness checks with pass/warn/fail status across config, storage, secrets, Render baseline, and owner bootstrap.
actions_taken: Added deploy readiness service
Added deploy readiness page, API, and CLI
Surfaced readiness summary on the home page
blockers: Secret key is still default in local development
Default owner email still uses placeholder local value
recent_logs.next_step: Move from deploy-readiness visibility into the first real auth slice for workspace access.

prompt_templates.title: Continue Knowledge Hub work
prompt_templates.content: Read the ready-for-next-chat handoff first, do not ask to restate context, and focus on the next production-safe improvement.
